description_long: This is a tall, round wooden stool with three slender, turned legs connected by two sets of horizontal stretchers for added stability. The seat is circular and features prominent red stains or marks, giving it a distressed or possibly vandalized appearance. The wood has a dark, weathered finish, with visible grain and some subtle wear, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The legs are slightly tapered and have decorative turning details, adding a touch of traditional craftsmanship. There is no backrest or armrest, and the stool is designed for simple, functional seating. The overall look is rustic, with a hint of urban grit due to the red markings.
description: A tall, round wooden stool with three turned legs and red stains on the seat, featuring a rustic, weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat with red stains and three turned legs, with the stains concentrated on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the red stains dripping down the front edge of the seat, making them more prominent.
description_view_2: Side view with the red stains visible on the right edge of the seat, and the leg details clearly shown.
description_view_3: Back view with the red stains mostly on the rear edge of the seat, and the leg stretchers visible.
